name: smart-illustrator
description: AI-powered article illustrations with intelligent position detection and a cover learning system. Uses Gemini API for image generation, supports Mermaid diagrams and Excalidraw exports.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (329 stars, MIT, TypeScript, created Feb 2026). SKILL.md present. Scripts directory contains TypeScript files for image generation (Gemini API), Mermaid/Excalidraw export, and a cover-learner. External API dependency on Gemini API noted. No open issues (0). Prompts directory contains structured learning-analysis and varied-styles markdown files. Bilingual README (EN/ZH). 44 forks indicating high community interest. External API key required - users should secure credentials.
